scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=packages/server & npm run dev --workspace=packages/web
scripts.debug: tsx watch packages/server/src/index.ts start --dir ./ --debug & npm run dev --workspace=packages/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/server && npm run build --workspace=packages/web
scripts.reset: rm -rf data/ && echo 'Database reset. Run npm run dev to start fresh.'
